case_title: P & S TOWING VS. ZENEN VARGAS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY P & S TOWING AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, ZENEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF P & S TOWING AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, ZENEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-01-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, ZENEN
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF P & S TOWING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-14-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHALL AMEND THE CLAIM TO ADD A-L EINANCIAL CORPORATION AS A DEFENDANT, AND SHALL SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. ALL OTHER ISSUES, INCLUDING VENUE, ARE RESTRICTED TO THE CONTINUED HEARING. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
